utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format includes 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six of these items. Each section appears to be fully detailed: 
- property: includes property type, price, currency, size, location, and features.
- financing: includes mortgage type, down payment, percentage, closing costs, interest rate, and currency.
- legal_services: includes service name, cost, and currency.
- moving_services: includes service name, cost, currency, and included features.
- setup_services: includes utility package type, cost, currency, and included services.
- total_budget: includes all cost breakdown items, currency, total, and notes.
All required items are present and fully specified with appropriate details.
